title: can't push down the 'or'/'in' filter
description:
### What happens?

can't push down the 'or' filter 

### To Reproduce

```
create table a(id int,name varchar(10));
insert into a values(1,'first');
insert into a values(2,'second');
insert into a values(3,'third');
explain select * from a where id = 1 or id =3;

┌─────────────────────────────┐
│┌───────────────────────────┐│
││       Physical Plan       ││
│└───────────────────────────┘│
└─────────────────────────────┘
┌───────────────────────────┐
│           FILTER          │
│    ────────────────────   │
│   ((id = 1) OR (id = 3))  │
│                           │
│          ~1 Rows          │
└─────────────┬─────────────┘
┌─────────────┴─────────────┐
│         SEQ_SCAN          │
│    ────────────────────   │
│             a             │
│                           │
│        Projections:       │
│             id            │
│            name           │
│                           │
│          ~3 Rows          │
└───────────────────────────┘

explain select * from a where id in (1,3);

┌─────────────────────────────┐
│┌───────────────────────────┐│
││       Physical Plan       ││
│└───────────────────────────┘│
└─────────────────────────────┘
┌───────────────────────────┐
│           FILTER          │
│    ────────────────────   │
│   ((id = 1) OR (id = 3))  │
│                           │
│          ~1 Rows          │
└─────────────┬─────────────┘
┌─────────────┴─────────────┐
│         SEQ_SCAN          │
│    ────────────────────   │
│             a             │
│                           │
│        Projections:       │
│             id            │
│            name           │
│                           │
│          ~3 Rows          │
└───────────────────────────┘

explain select * from a where id = 1 ;

┌─────────────────────────────┐
│┌───────────────────────────┐│
││       Physical Plan       ││
│└───────────────────────────┘│
└─────────────────────────────┘
┌───────────────────────────┐
│         SEQ_SCAN          │
│    ────────────────────   │
│             a             │
│                           │
│        Projections:       │
│             id            │
│            name           │
│                           │
│          Filters:         │
│  id=1 AND id IS NOT NULL  │
│                           │
│          ~1 Rows          │
└───────────────────────────┘
```

### OS:

linux

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.3

### DuckDB Client:

cli

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Eric

### Affiliation:

personal

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a stable release

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Not applicable - the reproduction does not require a data set

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE b(id INT, value FLOAT, name VARCHAR(20), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM b WHERE id = 1 OR value > 2.0;
